name: U.A. Powered Jersey
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｕ．Ａ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ウルトラアスリート</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>パワードギプス
desc: Equip only to a "U.A." monster. It gains 1000 ATK and DEF, also if it battles an opponent's monster, any battle damage it inflicts to your opponent is doubled. If the equipped monster destroys a monster by its attack: It can make a second attack during this Battle Phase. During your Standby Phase: Banish the equipped monster. If this card is sent to the Graveyard because the equipped monster returned to the hand: You can return this card to the hand.
eff: Equip only to a "U.A." monster. It gains 1000 ATK and DEF, also if it battles an opponent's monster, any battle damage it inflicts to your opponent is doubled. If the equipped monster destroys a monster by its attack: It can make a second attack during this Battle Phase. During your Standby Phase: Banish the equipped monster. If this card is sent to the Graveyard because the equipped monster returned to the hand: You can return this card to the hand.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
Activates if returned from the field to the hand
Returns itself from Graveyard to hand
misc: Equips only to a specific target
